title: Lemonade
tagline: Custom illustration vocabulary cropped small; rainbow palette dormant in 164 CSS vars. Variants: faithful, illustration-led, rainbow-as-IA.

direction.phrase: Brand-faithful refresh. Mode A: palette + typography pinned. Three variants: A faithful + improvements, B + C new directions. Density 56/40 desktop/mobile (refused airy).
movements: rainbow palette: dormant (85% mono) → IA wayfinding (C)

palette.name: Lemonade brand-pinned (164 CSS vars, 15+ rainbow)
brandFaithfulInversions: rainbow palette retained (salomie, algae, boston, eucalyptus, cupid, lavender…)

originalCritique: Lemonade ships an extraordinary brand system — 164 named CSS custom properties, a 15+ color rainbow palette, and a custom illustration vocabulary (line-art houses, pets, cars, people, pizza, app sketch) that is as distinctive as anything in DTC. The home renders ~85% monochrome with most illustrations cropped small. The brand has the most defensible, least-templatable assets on this page — and the page barely uses them.

variants.name: Faithful + improvements
variants.thesis: Same IA, same composition. Apply five improvements exactly: modular scale, balanced 56px density, single CTA per band, illustrations sized up, hero contrast support. No extras, no creative reach.
variants.fix: Same IA, same composition, same primary section sequence. Apply five identified improvements exactly. Modular scale; balanced 56/40 density (no editorial airiness); single priority CTA per band; illustrations sized up to give the brand's most defensible asset some weight; hero scrim. Brand team reaction target: "yes, that's us, with the obvious fixes."

variants.name: Illustrated character
variants.thesis: Lean into the illustration vocabulary. The line-art houses, pets, cars, people become section-defining structure — every section anchored by a single large illustrated moment instead of a thumbnail support cast.
variants.fix: Lean into the illustration vocabulary. The captured site has line-art houses, pets, cars, people, pizza, an app sketch — the brand's most defensible, least-templatable asset — and crops most of them small. B amplifies the illustration to section-defining structure. Every section gets one large illustrated moment as anchor, not a thumbnail support cast. The brand becomes visible in the only way it can't be templated.

variants.name: Rainbow as IA
variants.thesis: Surface the latent rainbow palette as the structural device for product distinction. The 15+ colors become wayfinding for the 5 product taxonomy (Home, Pet, Car, Life, Renters) — turning palette into IA.
variants.fix: Surface the latent rainbow palette as IA. Lemonade ships 164 CSS custom properties; 15+ define a rainbow secondary palette (salomie, algae, boston, eucalyptus, cupid, lavender). The captured home renders ~85% monochrome — the rainbow is dormant. C surfaces it as the structural device for product distinction: each of the 5 products gets a hue, the palette becomes wayfinding, the brand finally uses what it shipped.
